log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Duergar — Iron Concentration.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Duergar — Iron Concentration.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:2+3=5 vs AC 14] MISS.

→ Duergar — Iron Concentration: DEX save [d20:9+7=16 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.

ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Duergar — Iron Concentration: SUCCESS. 12 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

→ 2/5 targets affected.
